title: tephrosia curvata
intro: Tephrosia curvata, also known as the Curved Tephrosia, is a type of flowering plant native to tropical Africa. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating a variety of health conditions. The health benefits of Tephrosia curvata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infused in water to be consumed, with some herbal preparations also involving the use of the plant's roots and leaves in combination with other medicinal herbs.
